Resource.dc:title: 2022 Russia Ukraine War, Losses, Oryx + Images
Resource.dc:description: Open-source intelligence (OSINT) compilation of visually confirmed equipment losses related to the 2022 Russia–Ukraine war, derived from Oryx reporting and augmented with image-based entries. Includes per-side tallies, categories (e.g., armor, artillery, aircraft), and a separate image metadata table. Intended for research, journalism, and non-commercial analysis.
Resource.dc:subject: war
ukraine
russia
OSINT
oryx
armor
losses

dcterms:BibliographicResource.dc:title: losses_ukraine.csv
dcterms:BibliographicResource.dcterms:description: Per-item losses for Ukraine; structured by category and status.

dcterms:BibliographicResource.dc:title: losses_russia.csv
dcterms:BibliographicResource.dcterms:description: Per-item losses for Russia; structured by category and status.

dcterms:BibliographicResource.dc:title: img_losses_metadata_ukraine.csv
dcterms:BibliographicResource.dcterms:description: Image metadata and references associated with visually confirmed losses for Ukraine.

dcterms:BibliographicResource.dc:title: img_losses_metadata_russia.csv
dcterms:BibliographicResource.dcterms:description: Image metadata and references associated with visually confirmed losses for Russia.

Resource.dcterms:accessRights: Open for non-commercial use under CC BY-NC-SA 4.0.
Resource.dcterms:audience: Researchers; Data journalists; Policy analysts; OSINT practitioners
Resource.dcterms:provenance: Data compiled from publicly available imagery and reports; entries reflect visually confirmed equipment status at the time of capture. See dataset page for curation workflow.
Resource.dcterms:conformsTo: Community OSINT practices; cross-checked against Oryx listings.
